command:
import os, math
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont, ImageFilter

W, H = 1920, 1080
img = Image.new('RGB', (W, H))
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)

# Gradient background: dark red to black
for y in range(H):
    r = int(120 * (1 - y/H))
    g = int(15 * (1 - y/H))
    b = int(10 * (1 - y/H))
    draw.line([(0, y), (W, y)], fill=(r, g, b))

# Geometric decorations - subtle diamonds
for i in range(30):
    cx = (i * 137 + 50) % W
    cy = (i * 97 + 30) % H
    sz = 15 + (i % 10) * 3
    alpha_val = 30 + (i % 5) * 8
    pts = [(cx, cy-sz), (cx+sz, cy), (cx, cy+sz), (cx-sz, cy)]
    draw.polygon(pts, fill=(180, 140, 50, alpha_val) if i%2==0 else (150, 100, 30))

# Stars decoration
for i in range(20):
    sx = (i * 191 + 100) % W
    sy = (i * 83 + 50) % H
    for angle in range(0, 360, 72):
        ex = sx + int(8 * math.cos(math.radians(angle)))
        ey = sy + int(8 * math.sin(math.radians(angle)))
        draw.line([(sx, sy), (ex, ey)], fill=(200, 170, 80), width=1)

# Decorative border frame
border = 40
# Outer gold border
draw.rectangle([border, border, W-border, H-border], outline=(200, 165, 50), width=4)
# Inner border
draw.rectangle([border+15, border+15, W-border-15, H-border-15], outline=(180, 145, 40), width=2)
# Corner ornaments
for cx, cy in [(border+30, border+30), (W-border-30, border+30), (border+30, H-border-30), (W-border-30, H-border-30)]:
    draw.ellipse([cx-12, cy-12, cx+12, cy+12], outline=(210, 175, 60), width=2)
    draw.ellipse([cx-6, cy-6, cx+6, cy+6], fill=(210, 175, 60))

# Top and bottom decorative lines
for x in range(border+50, W-border-50, 40):
    draw.ellipse([x-3, border+7, x+3, border+13], fill=(200, 165, 50))
    draw.ellipse([x-3, H-border-13, x+3, H-border-7], fill=(200, 165, 50))

# Load fonts
try:
    font_main = ImageFont.truetype('C:/Windows/Fonts/arabtype.ttf', 72)
    font_sub = ImageFont.truetype('C:/Windows/Fonts/arabtype.ttf', 42)
except:
    try:
        font_main = ImageFont.truetype('C:/Windows/Fonts/arial.ttf', 72)
        font_sub = ImageFont.truetype('C:/Windows/Fonts/arial.ttf', 42)
    except:
        font_main = ImageFont.load_default()
        font_sub = ImageFont.load_default()

main_text = '\u0645\u0631\u062d\u0628\u0627\u064b \u0628\u0643\u0645 \u0641\u064a \u0645\u0637\u0639\u0645 \u0627\u0644\u0631\u0643\u0646 \u0627\u0644\u062c\u0645\u064a\u0644 \u0639\u0646\u062f \u0627\u0628\u0631\u0627\u0647\u064a\u0645'
sub_text = '\u0623\u0637\u0628\u0627\u0642 \u0634\u0647\u064a\u0629 \u0648\u0623\u062c\u0648\u0627\u0621 \u0631\u0627\u0642\u064a\u0629'

# Main text with shadow effect
bbox_main = draw.textbbox((0, 0), main_text, font=font_main)
tw = bbox_main[2] - bbox_main[0]
th = bbox_main[3] - bbox_main[1]
tx = (W - tw) // 2
ty = (H - th) // 2 - 40

# Shadow layers
for offset in range(6, 0, -1):
    shadow_alpha = 60 - offset * 8
    draw.text((tx + offset, ty + offset), main_text, font=font_main, fill=(20, 10, 0))

# Glow effect
for offset in [3, 2, 1]:
    draw.text((tx - offset, ty), main_text, font=font_main, fill=(255, 220, 100))
    draw.text((tx + offset, ty), main_text, font=font_main, fill=(255, 220, 100))
    draw.text((tx, ty - offset), main_text, font=font_main, fill=(255, 220, 100))
    draw.text((tx, ty + offset), main_text, font=font_main, fill=(255, 220, 100))

# Main text in gold
draw.text((tx, ty), main_text, font=font_main, fill=(255, 215, 0))

# Decorative line under main text
line_y = ty + th + 25
draw.line([(W//2 - 250, line_y), (W//2 + 250, line_y)], fill=(200, 165, 50), width=2)
draw.ellipse([W//2 - 8, line_y - 6, W//2 + 8, line_y + 6], fill=(210, 175, 60))

# Subtitle with shadow
bbox_sub = draw.textbbox((0, 0), sub_text, font=font_sub)
stw = bbox_sub[2] - bbox_sub[0]
stx = (W - stw) // 2
sty = line_y + 25
draw.text((stx + 2, sty + 2), sub_text, font=font_sub, fill=(30, 15, 0))
draw.text((stx, sty), sub_text, font=font_sub, fill=(255, 255, 255))

# Save to Desktop
desktop = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), 'Desktop')
os.makedirs(desktop, exist_ok=True)
path = os.path.join(desktop, 'restaurant_banner.png')
img.save(path, quality=95)
print(f'Image saved to: {path}')
print(f'Size: {os.path.getsize(path)} bytes')
print(f'Dimensions: {img.size}')
description: إنشاء صورة بانر احترافية لمطعم الركن الجميل عند ابراهيم - 1920x1080
